source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Get_HR_Core_Common_Updates_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'Refresh WF_People' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Refresh_WF_People73_') AS Get_HR_Core_Common_Updates_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Get_HR_Core_Common_Updates_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'Refresh WF_People' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Refresh_WF_People73_') AS Get_HR_Core_Common_Updates_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'Refresh WF_People' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Refresh_WF_People73_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'Refresh WF_People' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Refresh_WF_People73_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_Refresh_WF_People73__source_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'Refresh WF_People' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_Refresh_WF_People73_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_Refresh_WF_People73__source_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_Refresh_WF_People73__source_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'Refresh WF_People' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_Refresh_WF_People73_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_Refresh_WF_People73__source_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_Refresh_WF_People73__sink_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'Refresh WF_People' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_Refresh_WF_People73_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_Refresh_WF_People73__sink_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_Refresh_WF_People73__sink_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'Refresh WF_People' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_Refresh_WF_People73_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_Refresh_WF_People73__sink_TableName;

scripts.text: SELECT FORMAT(MAX(update_date), 'yyyyMMdd') AS lastRefreshDateString FROM dbo.WF_People

source.sqlReaderQuery: SELECT to_number(EMPLID) EMPLID     , PREF_FIRST_NAME || ' ' || PREF_LAST_NAME NAME     , PREF_FIRST_NAME FIRST_NAME     , PREF_LAST_NAME LAST_NAME     , EMAIL_ID     	TCOO Flag 		 00002115460 > Tiago Spritzer 		 00001672258 > Shan Ramanathan     , CASE 			WHEN (SPRVS_ORG_LVL_03_MGR_ID = '00002115460' OR SPRVS_ORG_LVL_06_MGR_ID = '00001672258') THEN 1 			ELSE 0  			END IS_TCOO         	Platform App Services Team Flag			 			 00002086646 > Rob Okai 			 00002117751 > Satish Ambale 	, CASE 			WHEN (SPRVS_ORG_LVL_04_MGR_ID = '00002086646' OR SPRVS_ORG_LVL_07_MGR_ID = '00002117751') THEN 1 			ELSE 0  			END IS_PLATFORM_APP_SVCS     , SPRVS_ORG_LVL_03_NAME     , SPRVS_ORG_LVL_03_MGR_NAME     , CASE      	WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(SPRVS_ORG_LVL_03_MGR_ID, '^[[:digit:]]+$')     	THEN to_number(SPRVS_ORG_LVL_03_MGR_ID)      	ELSE NULL     	END SPRVS_ORG_LVL_03_MGR_ID     , SPRVS_ORG_LVL_04_NAME     , SPRVS_ORG_LVL_04_MGR_NAME     , CASE      	WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(SPRVS_ORG_LVL_04_MGR_ID, '^[[:digit:]]+$')     	THEN to_number(SPRVS_ORG_LVL_04_MGR_ID)      	ELSE NULL     	END SPRVS_ORG_LVL_04_MGR_ID     , EMPL_STATUS     , EMPL_STATUS_DESC  FROM DISTRIBUTION.VW_CORE_COMMON WHERE WHEN_CHANGED >= TO_DATE('', 'YYYYMMDD')

scripts.text:
MERGE dbo.WF_People AS trgt
USING dbo.WF_People_Staging AS src
ON src.emplId = trgt.emplId

WHEN MATCHED
    THEN UPDATE SET
		  trgt.[name] = src.[name]
		, trgt.[lastName] = src.[lastName]
		, trgt.[firstName] = src.[firstName]
		, trgt.[email] = src.[email]
		, trgt.[isTcoo] = src.[isTcoo]
		, trgt.[isPlatformAppServices] = src.[isPlatformAppServices]
		, trgt.[level3Org] = src.[level3Org]
		, trgt.[level3Mgr] = src.[level3Mgr]
		, trgt.[level3MgrEmplid] = src.[level3MgrEmplid]
		, trgt.[level4Org] = src.[level4Org]
		, trgt.[level4Mgr] = src.[level4Mgr]
		, trgt.[level4MgrEmplid] = src.[level4MgrEmplid]
		, trgt.[employeeStatus] = src.[employeeStatus]
		, trgt.[update_date] = getDate()
		, trgt.[updated_by] = 'AD-ENT\TCOO_1TCOO_SSISD'
		, trgt.[source_name] = 'DISTRIBUTION.VW_CORE_COMMON'

WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET
    THEN INSERT 
		([emplId], [name], [lastName], [firstName], [email], [isTcoo], [isPlatformAppServices]
		, [level3Org], [level3Mgr], [level3MgrEmplid], [level4Org], [level4Mgr], [level4MgrEmplid]
		, [employeeStatus], [create_date], [update_date], [created_by], [updated_by], [source_name])
		VALUES
		(src.[emplId], src.[name], src.[lastName], src.[firstName], src.[email], src.[isTcoo]
		, src.[isPlatformAppServices], src.[level3Org], src.[level3Mgr], src.[level3MgrEmplid]
		, src.[level4Org], src.[level4Mgr], src.[level4MgrEmplid], src.[employeeStatus]
		, getDate(), getDate(), 'AD-ENT\TCOO_1TCOO_SSISD', 'AD-ENT\TCOO_1TCOO_SSISD', 'DISTRIBUTION.VW_CORE_COMMON')

--	DO NOT DELETE IF NOT MATCHED SOURCE
--	It means the record was not updated in HR.
--WHEN NOT MATCHED BY SOURCE
--    THEN DELETE;
;
